nasb.text: But he who received the one talent went away, and dug a hole in the ground and hid his master’s money.

esv.text: But he who had received the one talent went and dug in the ground and hid his master’s money.

cnv.text: 但那領了六千的，卻去把地挖開，把主人的錢藏起來。

ccb.text: 可是得到一千银币的却挖了一个洞，把主人的钱藏在地里。

csbs.text: 可是那领了一千的，却出去挖地，把他主人的银子藏起来。
